ses.vdmattributes.CfnAbout: The Virtual Deliverability Manager (VDM) attributes that apply to your Amazon SES account.

ses.vdmattributes.DashboardAttributes.Description: Specifies additional settings for your VDM configuration as applicable to the Dashboard.

ses.vdmattributes.GuardianAttributes.Description: Specifies additional settings for your VDM configuration as applicable to the Guardian.
